description:
🚀 Cohort 3.0 – Not Just Job Ready, Startup Ready.

This is not just another coding course.
This is a complete system to turn you into a builder.

In India, most students choose between:
💻 Getting a tech job
🚀 Building a startup

👉 Join Cohort 3.0:
https://sheryians.com/courses/69aaf85ed2c69a507ba793ad?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=coursetrailer&utm_campaign=coursetrailer1

🌐 Visit Our Website
https://sheryians.com/

👉 Cohort 3.0 is designed for both.
You don’t just learn development —
You build real products, understand startups, and prepare for real-world execution.

💡 What Makes Cohort 3.0 Different?
Learn Full Stack Web Development (Frontend + Backend)
Master Data Structures & Algorithms
Build with Generative AI (LLMs, RAG, AI Apps)
Create 2 Real-World Products (Launch-ready)
Learn Startup Building + Funding Basics
Work in Teams (Real Company-like Environment)
Daily Build Culture (Not Just Watching Videos)

👉 This is where you go from watching tutorials → building real things.
🚀 Startup + Product Experience

🌐 Connect With Us

📷 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sheryians_coding_school/
 𝕏 Twitter: https://x.com/sheryians_
📘 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sheryians.community
💌 Telegram: https://t.me/sheryiansCommunity
💼 LinkedIn: https://in.linkedin.com/company/the-sheryians-coding-school
🎮 Discord: https://discord.gg/Au3TquBarQ
